# terrible_pcg_alpaca_operator_alpaca_agent (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Unique name (hostname) of the agent.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Unique description of the agent.
- `escalation` (String) Escalation configuration.
- `ip_address` (String) IP address of the agent.
- `location` (String) Location of the agent. Can be `virtual`, `local1`, `local2`, or `remote`.
- `new_name` (String) Optional new name for the agent. If the agent specified in `name` exists, it will be renamed to this value. If the agent does not exist, a new agent will be created using this value.
- `script_group_id` (Number) Script Group ID.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the agent.

### Read-Only

- `agent_config` (String) Details of the created, updated, or deleted agent configuration
- `changed` (Boolean) Indicates whether any change was made
- `changes` (String) Dictionary showing differences between the current and desired configuration
- `msg` (String) Status message indicating the result of the operation
